---
title: false
pagetitle: "Conferences | Mesfin Genie"
page-layout: full
description: "Upcoming and recent conference presentations and published abstracts by Mesfin Genie."
image: /assets/og-card.png
---

```{=html}
<main id="main-content">
<header class="page-header"><div class="page-shell"><h1>Conferences</h1><p>Selected presentations and published conference abstracts.</p></div></header>
<section class="prose conference-page">
<h2>Upcoming presentations</h2>
<div class="timeline">
  <article class="timeline-item"><span class="event-status">Paper presentation</span><h3>International Conference on Choice Modelling</h3><p><strong>Gold Coast, Australia · 20–22 July 2026</strong><br>Attribute ordering, visual attention and choice behaviour in discrete choice experiments.</p></article>
  <article class="timeline-item"><span class="event-status">Podium presentation</span><h3>International Academy of Health Preference Research</h3><p><strong>Singapore · 5–7 October 2026</strong><br>Preferences and trade-offs for dementia support programme features: a discrete choice experiment in Australia.</p></article>
</div>
<h2>Recent presentations</h2>
<div class="timeline">
  <article class="timeline-item"><span class="event-status">Conference presentations</span><h3>Choice Modelling Conference / CDIC 2026</h3><p><strong>Melbourne, Australia · 15–17 June 2026</strong><br><em>Community First or My Body First?</em> and <em>No Jab, No Access?</em></p></article>
  <article class="timeline-item"><span class="event-status">Poster</span><h3>ISPOR 2026</h3><p><strong>Philadelphia, United States · 17–20 May 2026</strong><br><em>Choosing with Concern for the Worse-Off: Equity and Efficiency in Health Value Assessment.</em></p></article>
</div>
<h2>Published conference abstracts</h2>
<div class="conference-list">
  <article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491" target="_blank">PCR18 Are Discrete Choice Experiment Results Robust to Omitted Attributes?</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Verity Watson; Stéphane Luchini; Michaël Schwarzinger</div><div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 28, S549–S550 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.09.2491" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a></div></article>
  <article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296" target="_blank">MSR145 Do Framing and Attribute Number Influence Choice Consistency?</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div><div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 28, S302–S303 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2025.04.1296" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a></div></article>
  <article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508" target="_blank">MSR75 Guidance or Misdirection?</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Shelby Reed; Juan Gonzalez; Semra Ozdemir</div><div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 27, S274 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2024.03.1508" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a></div></article>
  <article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037" target="_blank">EPH155 Relative Effectiveness of Vaccination and Non-pharmaceutical Interventions</a></h3><div class="publication-authors">Asmita P. Khatiwada; Aregawi G. Gebremariam; <strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Tim C. Lai; Nabin Poudel; Surachat Ngorsuraches</div><div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 26, S192–S193 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1037" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a></div></article>
  <article class="publication-record"><h3><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873" target="_blank">PCR95 Decision Consistency in a Discrete Choice Experiment</a></h3><div class="publication-authors"><strong>Mesfin Genie</strong>; Surachat Ngorsuraches; Nabin Poudel</div><div class="publication-meta"><em>Value in Health</em>, 26, S329 <span class="status">Published abstract</span></div><div class="publication-links"><a href="https://doi.org/10.1016/j.jval.2023.03.1873" target="_blank">DOI ↗</a></div></article>
</div>
</section>
</main>
```
